objects.name: DICOM, Pydicom, GDCM, and Orthanc: A technical tour of what really happens in the heap
objects.description: This white paper presents a concrete case study demonstrating the creation of a heap overflow vulnerability through the exploitation of the DICOM file format.

external_references.description: DICOM, Pydicom, GDCM, and Orthanc: A technical tour of what really happens in the heap
